mapper.sql: id, workflow_id AS workflowId, workflow_name AS workflowName, participants, dataset_id AS datasetId, dataset_name AS datasetName, rounds, learning_rate AS learningRate, status, result_summary AS resultSummary, user_id AS userId, user_name AS userName, create_date AS createDate, update_date AS updateDate, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fl_workflow
is_del = 0 AND workflow_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{workflowName}, '%') AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fl_workflow WHERE is_del = 0 AND status = #{status}
SELECT , nodes FROM fl_workflow WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fl_workflow (workflow_id, workflow_name, participants, dataset_id, dataset_name, rounds, learning_rate, nodes, status, result_summary, user_id, user_name, organ_id, create_date, update_date) VALUES (#{workflowId}, #{workflowName}, #{participants}, #{datasetId}, #{datasetName}, #{rounds}, #{learningRate}, #{nodes}, #{status}, #{resultSummary}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{organId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE fl_workflow
workflow_name = #{workflowName}, participants = #{participants}, dataset_id = #{datasetId}, dataset_name = #{datasetName}, rounds = #{rounds}, learning_rate = #{learningRate}, nodes = #{nodes}, status = #{status}, result_summary = #{resultSummary}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE fl_workflow SET is_del = 1 WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fl_workflow_log (workflow_id, log_level, log_content, create_date) VALUES (#{workflowId}, #{logLevel}, #{logContent}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, workflow_id AS workflowId, log_level AS logLevel, log_content AS logContent, create_date AS createDate FROM fl_workflow_log WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE fl_workflow_log SET is_del = 1 WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId}
mapper.select: SELECT resource_id AS id, resource_name AS name FROM data_resource WHERE is_del = 0 AND organ_id = #{organId} ORDER BY resource_id DESC LIMIT 200
SELECT organ_id AS id, organ_name AS name FROM sys_organ WHERE (is_del = 0 OR is_del IS NULL) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 200
